description_long: This is a weathered, upright stone monument with a pointed arch top, reminiscent of Victorian-era memorials. The front face features intricate carvings, including columns and a draped motif above a recessed inscription panel, all showing signs of age and discoloration. The stone surface is mottled with dark stains and patina, suggesting prolonged outdoor exposure. The base is rectangular, slightly wider than the shaft, and appears to be made of the same stone, with some chipping and erosion visible. The sides are plain and reveal the thickness of the monument, while the back is unadorned and heavily stained. The overall structure is solid and heavy, likely intended as a permanent fixture in a cemetery or park.
description: A tall, arched stone monument with ornate carvings and a weathered, stained surface, set on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the stone and the weathered, rough texture along the edge.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned surface with significant staining and discoloration.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the monument's depth and the aged stone surface.
description_view_3: Front view revealing detailed carvings, columns, a draped motif, and an inscription panel on the arched face.
attribute_inscription: There is an inscription on the front recessed panel, written in English with serif lettering. The text is partially legible but weathered, making some words difficult to read.
attribute_ornamentation: Decorative carvings are present on the front, including two columns flanking the inscription, a draped cloth motif above, and some relief detailing around the arch.
attribute_base_design: The base is rectangular, slightly wider than the main shaft, and made of the same stone. It is simple, with some chipping and discoloration, and sits flush with the ground.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is a pointed arch, smoothly finished with no additional decoration, matching the overall Gothic style.
